content.title: Where Your Calling Meets Community
content.subtitle: A community-powered home created exclusively for Christian Yoga Teachers of Color—a space where your faith, culture, and calling are honored without compromise.

content.quote: "Christian Yoga Teachers of Color have carried their callings in silos for far too long. We’re here to change that."
content.body: We created the Flow in Faith Teachers Collective so teachers could have a place to grow, collaborate, and be affirmed in the fullness of their identity, their faith, and their culture—without shrinking or separating pieces of themselves to belong.

content.heading: How You Evolve
content.description: We provide a culturally-grounded home where your faith and practice can flourish together.

items.title: Belonging
items.description: Feel seen, supported, and connected inside a community that understands your faith, culture, and calling.

items.title: Visibility
items.description: Access opportunities that highlight your gifts and amplify your voice in meaningful and aligned spaces.

items.title: Connection
items.description: Build relationships that spark creativity, deepen your teaching, and reaffirm you don’t have to grow alone.

items.title: Lead Boldly
items.description: Move with confidence into the spaces God is guiding you—held by a community that affirms your presence and purpose.

content.title: What You Receive Inside the Collective
content.description: Beyond community, we provide the tools and opportunities you need to expand your reach and deepen your impact.

items.title: Daily Community Space
items.description: A private online space to connect, ask questions, share wins, and collaborate.

items.title: Monthly Check-ins
items.description: Virtual gatherings for networking and sharing challenges/opportunities.

items.title: Directory Placement
items.description: Public listing so practitioners can find and hire you worldwide.

items.title: Masterclasses
items.description: Quarterly workshops on business, theology, and trauma-informed practice.

items.title: Promotion
items.description: Highlighting your offerings on our social channels and newsletter.

items.title: Teaching Roles
items.description: Paid opportunities to host classes for our practitioner membership.

content.title: Ready to Begin Your Journey?
content.description: Join a community that honors your practice, your faith, and your culture.

content.title: Affirming Your Identity & Faith
content.subtitle: A space built by Christian Yoga Teachers of Color, for Christian Yoga Teachers of Color.

children.text: In July 2025, Queen hosted the inaugural Flow in Faith Virtual Summit and put out a call for Christian Yoga Teachers of Color to teach and speak. More than 50 teachers registered, showing just how many of us were out here doing this work.
Throughout the summit, it became clear that we needed a community where our voices, faith, and practice could belong together.

De and Queen began imagining what that could look like, a space made for us and by us. Soon after, Eboni and Morenike joined the vision, bringing their gifts and leadership to help shape what is now the Flow in Faith Teachers Collective.

content.heading: Leadership Team
content.description: When we gather, we’re reminded we were never meant to walk this calling alone.

content.title: Join our Sacred Space
content.description: Be part of a legacy that honors God and our heritage.
